phrases.intent_en: Ask if luggage storage takes cash only
phrases.cultural_note: A very short, direct answer is perfectly polite in this context.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the RegioJet ticket machines are
phrases.text_local: Kde jsou automaty na jízdenky RegioJet?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff often use the main entrance as a reference point in large stations.

likely_response.translation_en: To the left of the main entrance.

responses.english: To the left of the main entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next Airport Express bus leaves
phrases.text_local: Kdy odjíždí další autobus Airport Express?
phrases.cultural_note: Answers are typically terse and factual, giving the exact time remaining.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to validate PID tickets
phrases.cultural_note: Clear, direct instructions are the norm for these frequent queries.

likely_response.translation_en: Insert the ticket into the yellow validator.

responses.english: Insert the ticket into the yellow validator.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Leo Express kiosks are
phrases.cultural_note: Directions in stations are often given relative to the platforms.

likely_response.local: Rovně a pak doprava, u nástupiště.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead and then right, by the platform.

responses.english: Straight ahead and then right, by the platform.
responses.local: Rovně a pak doprava, u nástupiště.
